description: Provides loans up to $250,000 covering up to 50% of project costs for agricultural infrastructure. Eligible projects include barns, equipment, and storage facilities for Kentucky farmers.
eligibility: Kentucky farmers needing financing for agricultural infrastructure including barns, equipment, and storage facilities.
how_to_apply: Contact the Kentucky Agricultural Finance Corporation directly. Applications are reviewed at scheduled KAFC board meetings.
documents_needed: Contact the agency for required documentation.

description: Low-interest loan program targeted at beginning farmers in Kentucky. Designed to help new agricultural operators access affordable capital to start or expand their farming operations.
eligibility: Beginning farmers in Kentucky who have been farming for 10 years or less.
how_to_apply: Contact the Kentucky Agricultural Finance Corporation. Applications reviewed at KAFC board meetings.
documents_needed: Contact the agency for required documentation.

description: County-level cost-share grants and funding to support agricultural diversification and value-added production in Kentucky. Programs are administered at the county level through local agricultural development councils.
eligibility: Kentucky farmers pursuing agricultural diversification or value-added production. Eligibility and funding levels vary by county.
how_to_apply: Contact your county's Agricultural Development Council. Applications are reviewed locally.
documents_needed: Contact your county Agricultural Development Council for required documentation.

agency: Kentucky Department of Fish and Wildlife Resources (KDFWR)
description: Provides technical guidance and cost-share incentives up to 75% (typically $1,000/year) for habitat improvement projects on farms of 25+ acres. Includes the Kentucky Partners for Wetland Wildlife (KPWW) program offering 50% cost-share up to $5,000/year in partnership with NRCS and USFWS.
eligibility: Kentucky landowners/farmers with 25 or more acres interested in improving wildlife habitat on agricultural land.
how_to_apply: Apply online or contact your local KDFWR office. Visit the KDFWR Private Lands Program page for the online application form.
documents_needed: Contact the agency for required documentation.

description: Provides an interest rate buy-down of up to 3 percentage points on agricultural operating loans of $150,000 or less. Helps Ohio farmers reduce borrowing costs for operating expenses.
eligibility: Ohio farmers seeking operating loans of $150,000 or less through a participating lender.
how_to_apply: Apply through the Ohio Department of Agriculture in conjunction with a participating agricultural lender.
documents_needed: Contact the agency for required documentation.

agency: Ohio Department of Agriculture / Ohio EPA
description: Provides grants and cost-share funding for water-quality conservation practices on Ohio agricultural land, including cover crops, drainage management, and wetland restoration to reduce nutrient runoff.
eligibility: Ohio farmers and landowners in priority H2Ohio watersheds interested in implementing water-quality conservation practices.
how_to_apply: Apply through the Ohio Department of Agriculture. Priority given to farms in designated H2Ohio watersheds.
documents_needed: Contact the agency for required documentation.

agency: Ohio Department of Natural Resources (ODNR) Division of Wildlife
description: Offers up to 75% cost-share plus annual per-acre payments of $2–$30 for creating or restoring grassland and wildlife habitat on farmland. Approximately $9 million available through USDA RCPP funding. Benefits quail, pollinators, and other wildlife.
eligibility: Ohio farmers and landowners willing to create or restore grassland habitat. Minimum acreage requirements may apply.
how_to_apply: Contact ODNR Division of Wildlife or your local county Extension office. Apply through the ohiodnr.gov portal or a local ODNR wildlife biologist.
documents_needed: Contact the agency for required documentation.

description: Provides grants and loans for new and expanding agricultural businesses in West Virginia. Supports farm infrastructure, equipment, and business development to strengthen the state's agricultural economy.
eligibility: West Virginia farmers and agricultural businesses starting new operations or expanding existing ones.
how_to_apply: Apply through the West Virginia Department of Agriculture.
documents_needed: Contact the agency for required documentation.

program_name: Veterans and Heroes to Agriculture Program
description: Reimburses up to $600 per year for agricultural training costs for veterans and active-duty military personnel transitioning to farming in West Virginia.
eligibility: Veterans and active-duty military personnel in West Virginia pursuing agricultural training.
how_to_apply: Apply through the West Virginia Department of Agriculture.
documents_needed: Proof of veteran or active-duty status. Contact the agency for full documentation requirements.

description: Supports agricultural diversification and specialty crop production in West Virginia through grants and cost-share funding including the Specialty Crop Block Grant program.
eligibility: West Virginia farmers engaged in or seeking to expand specialty crop and diversified agricultural production.
how_to_apply: Apply through the West Virginia Department of Agriculture.
documents_needed: Contact the agency for required documentation.

program_name: WVDNR Partners for Fish and Wildlife
agency: West Virginia Division of Natural Resources (WVDNR) / USFWS
description: Provides technical and financial assistance for riparian, stream, wetland, and upland habitat restoration projects on West Virginia farms in partnership with the US Fish and Wildlife Service.
eligibility: West Virginia landowners and farmers interested in restoring or improving fish and wildlife habitat on their agricultural land.
how_to_apply: Contact the West Virginia Division of Natural Resources or your local conservation district. Coordinate with USFWS field office.
documents_needed: Contact the agency for required documentation.
